description: Case style: Analogue watch with a rectangular stainless steel case Dial style: Black dial with blue accents and silver hands Features: Branding at the 12 hour mark and screw to reset time Strap style: Black genuine leather strap with a tang clasp Water resistant: Upto 30 meters, suitable for contact with splashes of water or rain, but not for swimming or diving Warranty: 2 years
